query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `podcast_shows` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `subtitle` varchar(500),
  `description` text,
  `host_persona` enum('candy','valanna','seraph') NOT NULL,
  `host_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `cover_image_url` text,
  `theme_color` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#a78bfa',
  `schedule_day` varchar(100),
  `schedule_time` varchar(50),
  `schedule_timezone` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'CT',
  `is_live` tinyint DEFAULT 0,
  `total_episodes` int DEFAULT 0,
  `total_listeners` int DEFAULT 0,
  `spotify_url` text,
  `apple_url` text,
  `youtube_url` text,
  `rss_feed_url` text,
  `is_active` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `podcast_episodes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `show_id` int NOT NULL,
  `episode_number` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `audio_url` text,
  `audio_file_key` varchar(500),
  `video_url` text,
  `thumbnail_url` text,
  `duration` int,
  `file_size` int,
  `status` enum('draft','uploading','processing','ready','published','scheduled','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `published_at` bigint,
  `scheduled_publish_at` bigint,
  `spotify_episode_id` varchar(255),
  `apple_episode_id` varchar(255),
  `youtube_video_id` varchar(255),
  `distribution_status` json,
  `play_count` int DEFAULT 0,
  `download_count` int DEFAULT 0,
  `like_count` int DEFAULT 0,
  `tags` json,
  `guest_names` json,
  `show_notes` text,
  `transcript_url` text,
  `chapters` json,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `call_in_queue` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `show_id` int NOT NULL,
  `session_id` int,
  `user_id` int,
  `caller_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `caller_email` varchar(255),
  `topic` text,
  `status` enum('waiting','screening','ready','on_air','completed','dropped','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'waiting',
  `queue_position` int DEFAULT 0,
  `peer_id` varchar(255),
  `connection_type` enum('webrtc','phone','sip') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'webrtc',
  `is_muted` tinyint DEFAULT 1,
  `joined_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `on_air_at` bigint,
  `ended_at` bigint,
  `duration_on_air` int,
  `rating` int,
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
